record.field: draw.io is a powerful client-side diagramming and whiteboarding editor that keeps your diagram data entirely under your control.

draw.io is a powerful client-side diagramming and whiteboarding editor that keeps your diagram data entirely under your control.

draw.io (also known as diagrams.net) is a JavaScript application for building flowcharts, network and architecture diagrams, UML, org charts, mockups and more. By design it never stores diagrams on its own servers: files live on your chosen backend, making it ideal for self-hosted, privacy-conscious deployments. It can run fully offline or air-gapped, and integrates with platforms like Confluence, Jira, GitHub and VS Code.

Key features
  • Rich diagram editor with extensive shape libraries (flowcharts, UML, network, AWS/Azure/GCP, BPMN and more)
  • Client-side, data-ownership model: diagrams stored on local disk, cloud, Git or your own backend, not on vendor servers
  • Official Docker image with optional server-side export to PDF, images and Visio (.vsdx)
  • Offline and air-gapped operation via the offline mode parameter and self-contained deployment
  • Hardened, configurable deployment: custom Content-Security-Policy, external-proxy endpoint disabled by default
  • Embeds and integrations for Confluence, Jira, GitHub, GitLab and VS Code, plus a desktop app
Best for

Teams and organizations that need professional diagramming and visual documentation while keeping data inside their own perimeter, including security-sensitive and air-gapped environments, and developers embedding editable diagrams into wikis, repos and CI pipelines.

services: plantuml-server: image: plantuml/plantuml-server ports: - '8080' volumes: - ./fonts_volume:/usr/share/fonts/drawio container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_plantuml_server' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal image-export: image: jgraph/export-server ports: - '8000' volumes: - ./fonts_volume:/usr/share/fonts/drawio environment: - DRAWIO_BASE_URL=${DRAWIO_BASE_URL} container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_image_export' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal drawio: image: jgraph/drawio:24.7.17 ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:8080' links: - plantuml-server:plantuml-server - image-export:image-export depends_on: - plantuml-server - image-export environment: RAWIO_SELF_CONTAINED: 1 DRAWIO_USE_HTTP: 1 PLANTUML_URL: http://plantuml-server:8080/ EXPORT_URL: http://image-export:8000/ DRAWIO_BASE_URL: ${DRAWIO_BASE_URL} DRAWIO_SERVER_URL: ${DRAWIO_SERVER_URL} DRAWIO_CSP_HEADER: ${DRAWIO_CSP_HEADER} DRAWIO_VIEWER_URL: ${DRAWIO_VIEWER_URL} DRAWIO_LIGHTBOX_URL: ${DRAWIO_LIGHTBOX_URL} DRAWIO_CONFIG: ${DRAWIO_CONFIG} DRAWIO_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID: ${DRAWIO_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID} DRAWIO_GOOGLE_APP_ID: ${DRAWIO_GOOGLE_APP_ID} DRAWIO_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET: ${DRAWIO_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET} DRAWIO_GOOGLE_VIEWER_CLIENT_ID: ${DRAWIO_GOOGLE_VIEWER_CLIENT_ID} DRAWIO_GOOGLE_VIEWER_APP_ID: ${DRAWIO_GOOGLE_VIEWER_APP_ID} DRAWIO_GOOGLE_VIEWER_CLIENT_SECRET: ${DRAWIO_GOOGLE_VIEWER_CLIENT_SECRET} DRAWIO_MSGRAPH_CLIENT_ID: ${DRAWIO_MSGRAPH_CLIENT_ID} DRAWIO_MSGRAPH_CLIENT_SECRET: ${DRAWIO_MSGRAPH_CLIENT_SECRET} DRAWIO_MSGRAPH_TENANT_ID: ${DRAWIO_MSGRAPH_TENANT_ID} DRAWIO_GITLAB_ID: ${DRAWIO_GITLAB_ID} DRAWIO_GITLAB_SECRET: ${DRAWIO_GITLAB_SECRET} DRAWIO_GITLAB_URL: ${DRAWIO_GITLAB_URL} DRAWIO_CLOUD_CONVERT_APIKEY: ${DRAWIO_CLOUD_CONVERT_APIKEY} container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
